top_signals.title: Oil Holds Gain as Iran Seeks Hormuz Control Before Talks With US
top_signals.summary: Oil held an advance, as a top Iranian official reiterated the country’s determination to maintain control over the Strait of Hormuz before fresh peace talks with the US.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: DeSantis KOs bill to allow CDL training of some Florida inmates
top_signals.summary:
Ron DeSantis vetoed a bill that would have allowed some Florida inmates to get CDL training.

The post DeSantis KOs bill to allow CDL training of some Florida inmates appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: The new AI-based world order
top_signals.summary: A single factor is now dictating the hierarchy of global returns
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump bought as much as $5 million in Axon stock before ICE sought $220 million Taser deal
top_signals.summary: Axon Enterprise has ramped up lobbying in Congress on federal law enforcement technology as ICE pursues a potential $220 million Taser deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Baidu shares jump 7% as AI chip arm Kunlunxin said to target $50 billion Hong Kong IPO
top_signals.summary: Baidu's Hong Kong-listed shares rose over 6% amid reports that its AI chip unit Kunlunxin is targeting a $50 billion initial public offering in the city.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: AeroVironment soars 19% on earnings beat, backlog grows to $1.2 billion
top_signals.summary: Dronemaker AeroVironment's autonomous system revenue beat expectations by $90 million and its backlog continued to grow.
